1563754a-9453-42d6-8b93-62c32e21cddb.name: Grower / Farm Operator
1563754a-9453-42d6-8b93-62c32e21cddb.summary: Grows or raises the raw agricultural input; increasingly required to keep records for food safety (Produce Safety Rule) and sustainability programs.

245e5a0a-9256-4674-9a00-c8dee481e441.name: Farm Worker
245e5a0a-9256-4674-9a00-c8dee481e441.summary: Performs harvesting, handling, and initial packing under grower supervision; subject to worker health/hygiene requirements under the Produce Safety Rule.

7b508ca3-d41f-46be-a4c1-d622437576a2.name: Supplier Quality Manager
7b508ca3-d41f-46be-a4c1-d622437576a2.summary: Owns the approved supplier program: qualification, ongoing COA review, re-audits, and risk assessment of ingredient and packaging suppliers.

9c565276-585b-4a14-b9a3-2bd47ffa9306.name: Procurement / Buyer
9c565276-585b-4a14-b9a3-2bd47ffa9306.summary: Places purchase orders, manages supplier commercial relationships, and coordinates lead times feeding MRP.

7f9e6386-c3eb-4ecc-a0e6-a39378e6fc8b.name: Receiving Clerk / Dock Associate
7f9e6386-c3eb-4ecc-a0e6-a39378e6fc8b.summary: Executes physical receipt at the dock: unloading, counting, initial visual inspection, temperature checks on inbound trucks.

fdafae64-3659-4c78-9715-e64c6531078a.name: QA Technician
fdafae64-3659-4c78-9715-e64c6531078a.summary: Performs incoming inspection against spec, COA review, in-process sampling and testing, and routine verification activities (ATP swabs, allergen swabs).

b03ed7b2-3c47-488d-a987-bbea51c118a4.name: Warehouse Associate
b03ed7b2-3c47-488d-a987-bbea51c118a4.summary: Executes putaway, picking, and replenishment in raw material or finished goods storage, typically directed by WMS FEFO logic.

cbf4a032-afb3-4874-808c-d4db7121ef29.name: Inventory / Materials Planner
cbf4a032-afb3-4874-808c-d4db7121ef29.summary: Monitors raw material and packaging inventory levels against MRP requirements; manages hold/release and quarantine status.

6dfbb1aa-62f9-4783-8024-7097442d4931.name: Demand Planner
6dfbb1aa-62f9-4783-8024-7097442d4931.summary: Builds the demand forecast feeding the Master Production Schedule using historical sales, promotions, and customer orders.

859b09e9-8ca9-407a-add8-cf8286ae4c47.name: Production Scheduler
859b09e9-8ca9-407a-add8-cf8286ae4c47.summary: Builds and sequences the production schedule, balancing capacity, changeover time, allergen sequencing, and shelf life.

19d254bc-e885-4b41-86cb-5bc0fe0c623b.name: Formulation / R&D Specialist
19d254bc-e885-4b41-86cb-5bc0fe0c623b.summary: Owns recipe/BOM accuracy, including ingredient data that feeds Nutrition Facts calculation and allergen declarations.

6aae9040-366c-4cfe-903f-da172231f4f0.name: Line Operator
6aae9040-366c-4cfe-903f-da172231f4f0.summary: Runs production equipment, executes batching/staging, and performs first-line CCP monitoring and in-process checks.

87d1f952-ed5a-4dc5-9a93-f788b179755b.name: Preventive Controls Qualified Individual (PCQI)
87d1f952-ed5a-4dc5-9a93-f788b179755b.summary: Named, trained individual who prepares or oversees the Food Safety Plan required under FSMA Preventive Controls (21 CFR 117).

1ff0e866-1829-4ebf-bc75-55adef9f19dd.name: HACCP Team
1ff0e866-1829-4ebf-bc75-55adef9f19dd.summary: Cross-functional team that conducts hazard analysis, identifies CCPs, and maintains the HACCP plan.

2c80f2c0-5690-4666-8bb3-872397ad1bf4.name: QA Verifier
2c80f2c0-5690-4666-8bb3-872397ad1bf4.summary: Verifies that CCP monitoring, corrective actions, and preventive controls are functioning as intended (distinct from the operator who monitors).

b968abdd-8354-4eb8-91da-198e8cbb3caa.name: Sanitation Crew
b968abdd-8354-4eb8-91da-198e8cbb3caa.summary: Executes cleaning and sanitizing tasks per the Master Sanitation Schedule, including allergen changeover cleaning.

7ebd1afb-69de-4795-842d-9893e61046eb.name: Packaging Line Operator
7ebd1afb-69de-4795-842d-9893e61046eb.summary: Runs fill/seal/case-pack equipment; monitors catch weight and package integrity.

bf3074df-b754-4b6e-9ca0-4bc175a487fb.name: Label / Regulatory Reviewer
bf3074df-b754-4b6e-9ca0-4bc175a487fb.summary: Reviews label copy for allergen accuracy, Nutrition Facts correctness, and claims compliance before artwork release.

9e3e7bec-9c72-4e45-bff2-97761eb57ae5.name: Regulatory Affairs Specialist
9e3e7bec-9c72-4e45-bff2-97761eb57ae5.summary: Ensures label claims, nutrition data, and disclosures (BE, organic) meet FDA/USDA requirements; manages FSIS label submissions.

6855f374-f3ec-41b1-a96b-3f3f8284522b.name: Shipping Clerk
6855f374-f3ec-41b1-a96b-3f3f8284522b.summary: Prepares outbound shipments, generates ASNs and shipping documents, and records lot/SSCC data at the point product leaves the facility.

7fb4b883-9d15-4a05-9762-f982fbe8c7c2.name: Quality Manager
7fb4b883-9d15-4a05-9762-f982fbe8c7c2.summary: Oversees the plant quality management system: CAPA, specifications, internal audits, and management review.

3cfcbb7d-59c4-4e4c-a205-db57bcd17575.name: Plant Manager
3cfcbb7d-59c4-4e4c-a205-db57bcd17575.summary: Accountable for overall plant operations and performance, including OEE, yield, and coordination across production and quality.

9d45f06e-8c0f-41d3-ba64-5f8fae92ba40.name: Recall Coordinator
9d45f06e-8c0f-41d3-ba64-5f8fae92ba40.summary: Executes the recall plan: lot identification, quarantine, customer notification, and effectiveness checks, including mock recall exercises.

a24945f1-6c80-4a7f-9f67-15d6cf04d44a.name: Distribution / Logistics Manager
a24945f1-6c80-4a7f-9f67-15d6cf04d44a.summary: Manages outbound transportation, 3PL relationships, and cold-chain compliance in transit.

837147a2-f02e-449a-8386-854e70860fc8.name: Retail / Foodservice Operator
837147a2-f02e-449a-8386-854e70860fc8.summary: Receives, stores, merchandises, and (for foodservice) prepares product downstream of the plant; regulated locally under the FDA Food Code model.

47f067ee-2480-4007-ac92-c30b8b109d9d.name: Consumer
47f067ee-2480-4007-ac92-c30b8b109d9d.summary: End recipient of the product; source of complaint data that is often the first signal of an emerging quality or safety issue.
